title: Anatomy of a Box Plot in R
description: A labeled diagram showing the components of a box plot created with R's ggplot2, explaining what each part represents in terms of data distribution.
relationships: The box spans from Q1 to Q3, containing the IQR. The median line divides the box. Whiskers extend from the box to the minimum and maximum values within 1.5*IQR. Points beyond the whiskers are plotted individually as potential outliers.
